source.note: tests/*.json + tests.schema.json + test-report.schema.json vendored VERBATIM (byte-stable; sha256 below). The upstream repo has no tags/releases; the commit SHA is the only pin.

declaredUnsupported.title: decimal lowBoundary
declaredUnsupported.reason: lowBoundary()/highBoundary() are experimental FHIRPath additions (upstream-tagged experimental, outside the SQL-on-FHIR v2 shareable set); not implemented by the pinned fhirpath@4.10.1 stable surface. Deferred until the spec + library stabilize.

declaredUnsupported.title: join with comma
declaredUnsupported.reason: join() is upstream-tagged experimental (outside the shareable set). Deferred with the same honesty rule: declared, counted, never silently skipped.
